title: Quran, Sura 90: Al-Balad
description: Sura 90 (Al-Balad: The City) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 90 (Al-Balad: The City) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: I swear by this city — and you are free of restriction in this city — and by the father and that which was born of him: We have certainly created man into hardship.
